description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on every pull request to the develop branch. The workflow has five jobs: build_windows_msvc_base, build_windows_msvc_base_cpp14, build_windows_msvc_base_cpp17, build_windows_msvc_py_ver, and build_windows_clang. Each job runs on a windows-latest environment and performs various tasks such as setting up MPI, Python environment, checking out code, building, and testing using cmake.
